text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I lost again. Even though winning was absolutely
necessary.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Even though I needed to prove myself worthy of
the Mejiro family name...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How can I ever get through this? How can I?
choice_data_list: Relax and take some deep breaths.
Relax and take some deep breaths.
Don't let this get the best of you!
Don't let this get the best of you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How can I ever get through this? How can I?
choice_data_list: Relax and take some deep breaths.
Relax and take some deep breaths.
Don't let this get the best of you!
Don't let this get the best of you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I feel a little better now. It seems my shoulders
were overly tense.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I must learn to control my mindset as well.
Goodness, I have so many challenges to
overcome.
choice_data_list: All that matters is that you don't give up.
All that matters is that you don't give up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You're right. Truer words never said.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine now. Let's continue our training for
victory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I'm very sorry. It was disgraceful of me to
display such agitation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What you mean to say is that I must grit my teeth
and produce better results next time, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to worry. I will never back down
from a challenge. Next time, I will win and elevate
the prestigious Mejiro name!
